name: cashsnap_two_stage_real_synth_p24_khr100_unknown_gate_browser_stack

evidence.summary: Real+synth p24 detector with the repaired KHR_100-aware proposal gate at reject>=0.72 is the strongest current browser-stack candidate. At reject>=0.72, held-out product-bridge KHR100 detector-proposal FPs clear to 0/12 images, full-real exact-value is 1261/1562 with 37 background-FP images and recall 0.9388, and strict-clean exact-value is 679/774 with 3 background-FP images and recall 0.9574. The added KHR detector class floors preserve full-real and strict-clean detector recall at conf=0.05 while trimming low-confidence KHR echo proposals, and preserve the 10-image visible-evidence extension recall. The older fragment-aware denomination reclassifier fails on this stronger gate stack, dropping full-real exact-value by 28 and recall by 0.0588. Versus the balanced-real rej080 product clue, per-image exact-value net is +29 full-real and +11 strict-clean, with nonzero losses still present. This remains diagnostic until schema/product promotion work is done.

known_limits: Diagnostic current-best browser candidate only; not production-promoted.
The current 13-class detector schema still cannot count USD_2, KHR_100, KHR_200, or other missing official21 denominations as target classes.
Rejecting official KHR_100 is only correct under the current schema; final all-riel/all-target CashSnap requires official21 schema expansion instead of rejection.
USD_2 is target-like for the current gate: the top-52 USD_2 missing-schema slice still has 39/52 background-FP images at reject>=0.72 and 34/52 even when every reject-top crop is rejected.
Reject>=0.72 is a product threshold trade: it improves count/value and background behavior versus 0.80/0.99, but spends some full-real recall versus the conservative 0.99 setting.
Detector class_min_conf is a postprocess calibration knob, not evidence that the detector learned better visible-evidence localization.
The gate rejects proposals but does not correct denomination classes or teach detector visible-evidence localization.
Do not add the current denomination reclassifier to this stack; the guard comparison shows worse recall/precision and more wrong-class FNs.
